$meta.notes: All formulas verbatim from official wiki pages. Fields marked _verify need confirmation from wiki before shipping.

strength.also: increases base Block Power, thrown damage/range, unarmed damage (_verify amounts)

vitality._verify: Search snippet may have swapped VIT/WIL grants; confirm on wiki page (VIT giving Energy is unusual).

willpower._verify: Confirm Max Health/Energy sources; check Health and Energy pages for base + per-level scaling.

combat.hit: roll 1-100 vs Accuracy; projectile spells use base Accuracy + Perception bonus only (no item accuracy)
combat.fumble: weapon attacks deal half damage (incl. magical component); no secondary effects; fumbled sorcery = full damage but higher cost/cooldown
combat.crit: damage x Crit Efficiency (incl. magical component); sorcery x Miracle Potency

crit_weapon_bonus.dagger: +50% Crit Efficiency; burn 10% target Max Energy

block.recovery: Block Power Recovery % of max per turn

combat.resistances: percentage reduction after block+protection; groups: Physical (slash/pierce/crush/rend), Nature (fire/frost/shock/poison/caustic), Magic (arcane/unholy/sacred/psionic)
combat.restoration_tick: Health/Energy Restoration fills hidden scale by stat% per turn; at 100% restores 5% of max, overflow carries
combat.fortitude: reduces negative effect duration; fractional rounds up; min 1 turn

calibration._note: FINAL CALIBRATION v3, from fresh L1 Hilda (VIT11: HP 100, EN 104) + fresh L1 Mahir (VIT10: HP 100, EN 102 incl. +2 garment) + L18 Hilda sheet. HP = 100 flat + 15/VIT-threshold (NO per-point HP ŌĆö matches wiki Vitality page; L18 Hilda's 103 = Athletics passive). calibration.crit_efficiency_cap_note: cap 150 means +150% bonus (max 250% total); game shows 151.3% uncapped
calibration._verify: accuracy/crit/crit-eff/fumble bases fitted to one sheet; energy/health restoration bases still estimates
